name: @ts-doctor/engine-effect
description: THE integrating keystone of the ts-doctor modernization: the two-tier `runEngine` (RULE-018 partial-honesty gate + RULE-036 Program disposal via Scope + RULE-013 memory guard, now WIRED) and the `diagnose()` orchestration that wires ~12 finished strangler-fig slices into a working end-to-end analysis. The ONE genuinely-effectful part is the `ts.Program` lifecycle (scale.scopedProgram); rule execution stays pure synchronous. `diagnose` is an Effect over FileSystem|Path|Scope; `diagnoseNode` is the prod runnable over NodeContext.
